description.p: InLook is a small, fast viewer for .eml email files (the standard RFC 822 / MIME format used by Outlook, Thunderbird, and most other mail clients when saving a single message to disk).

Open an .eml file to see the headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date), the body, and any attachments. HTML email bodies are rendered inside a sandboxed WebView with a strict Content Security Policy: no remote images, no remote stylesheets, no scripts, no tracking pixels — only what is embedded in the message itself.
InLook does not connect to the network, does not modify the files you open, and stores no preferences. It is Free Software released under the MIT or Apache 2.0 licenses, whichever you prefer.

ul.li: Renders both HTML and plain-text email bodies
Strict CSP + sandbox isolation for embedded HTML
Refuses files over 50 MiB as a DoS safeguard

description.p: Bundles an app icon and follows the system dark/light theme.
AppImage builds on runners without FUSE.
First multi-platform release: Windows MSI, Linux .deb and AppImage, macOS .dmg.
